notes: All five are named in the statement and plausibly load-bearing: an occurrence of a variable (def:variable) in a formula (def:formula) is bound if within the scope (def:scope) of a quantifier forall x / exists x (def:universal-q/def:existential-q). Possible trim: def:universal-q/def:existential-q may be transitive via def:scope (0075), which already carries them -- reviewer may reduce to {def:formula, def:scope, def:variable}. Kept as-is since all are explicitly named.
